standards.name: ISO/IEC 42001:2023
standards.title: Artificial intelligence — Management system
standards.description: Requirements for establishing, implementing, maintaining, and continually improving an AI management system. Provides a systematic approach to managing AI-related risks and opportunities.

standards.name: ISO/IEC 23894:2023
standards.title: Artificial intelligence — Guidance on risk management
standards.description: Provides guidance on managing risk related to AI systems for organizations that develop, produce, deploy, or use AI systems. Extends ISO 31000 risk management principles to AI contexts.

standards.name: ISO/IEC 22989:2022
standards.title: Artificial intelligence — Concepts and terminology
standards.description: Establishes terminology and describes concepts in the field of artificial intelligence. Foundation standard for other AI standards.

standards.name: ISO/IEC 23053:2022
standards.title: Framework for Artificial Intelligence (AI) Systems Using Machine Learning (ML)
standards.description: Establishes an AI/ML framework describing a generic AI system using ML technology and its components.

standards.name: ISO/IEC TS 25059:2023
standards.title: Software engineering — Systems and software Quality Requirements and Evaluation (SQuaRE) — Quality model for AI systems
standards.description: Defines a quality model for AI systems extending the SQuaRE series with AI-specific quality characteristics including functional correctness, performance efficiency, and trustworthiness.

standards.name: prEN XXXX (JTC 21 WG 2)
standards.title: AI Risk Management System Requirements
standards.description: Harmonised standard under development for AI risk management systems as required by Article 9. Will specify detailed requirements for identifying, assessing, and mitigating risks throughout the AI system lifecycle.

standards.name: prEN XXXX (JTC 21 WG 3)
standards.title: AI Data Governance Requirements
standards.description: Harmonised standard under development for data governance as required by Article 10. Will cover data quality, representativeness, bias assessment, and data management practices.

standards.name: prEN XXXX (JTC 21 WG 4)
standards.title: AI Transparency and Information Requirements
standards.description: Harmonised standard under development for transparency requirements as specified in Articles 13 and 50. Will detail how providers must make AI system output interpretable and document instructions for use.

standards.name: prEN XXXX (JTC 21 WG 4)
standards.title: AI Human Oversight Requirements
standards.description: Harmonised standard under development for human oversight measures as required by Article 14. Will specify requirements for human monitoring, interpretation, override capability, and automation bias mitigation.

standards.name: prEN XXXX (JTC 21 WG 5)
standards.title: AI Accuracy, Robustness, and Cybersecurity Requirements
standards.description: Harmonised standard under development for technical requirements as specified in Article 15. Will cover accuracy metrics, robustness testing, bias detection, and cybersecurity measures.

standards.name: prEN XXXX (JTC 21 WG 2)
standards.title: AI Technical Documentation Requirements
standards.description: Harmonised standard under development for technical documentation as required by Article 11 and Annex IV. Will specify detailed content requirements for technical documentation of high-risk AI systems.

standards.name: prEN XXXX (JTC 21 WG 6)
standards.title: AI Conformity Assessment Procedures
standards.description: Harmonised standard under development for conformity assessment procedures for high-risk AI systems as detailed in Annexes VI and VII of the AI Act.

standards.name: prEN XXXX (JTC 21 WG 2)
standards.title: AI Post-Market Monitoring Requirements
standards.description: Harmonised standard under development for post-market monitoring systems as required by Article 72. Will specify requirements for continuous performance monitoring, incident detection, and corrective action.

standards.name: ISO/IEC 27001:2022
standards.title: Information security, cybersecurity and privacy protection — Information security management systems — Requirements
standards.description: Requirements for establishing, implementing, maintaining, and continually improving an information security management system. Relevant for AI system cybersecurity requirements under Article 15.

standards.name: ISO/IEC 5338:2023
standards.title: Information technology — Artificial intelligence — AI system life cycle processes
standards.description: Defines processes and activities applicable throughout the AI system life cycle. Extends ISO/IEC/IEEE 15288 systems engineering processes for AI-specific considerations.
